_comment: Example AuditEvent — authorization_decision with 'denied' outcome from default deny. Carol (admin) requests an action not covered by any registered rule. All rules return not_applicable. The engine returns NOT_APPLICABLE (default deny). The EnforcementPoint records this as 'denied' in the audit record. The trace shows all rules returned not_applicable, and short_circuited is false because evaluation ran to completion. matched_rules is empty because no rule had an opinion.
reason: No policy rule is registered for action 'invoke:experimental:feature'. Every action that can be requested must be covered by at least one rule in the engine's chain. Default: deny.

evaluated_rules.reason: Action 'invoke:experimental:feature' is not in this rule's role table.
